ModMetaData.name: Odyssey Shuttle Variants
ModMetaData.author: Luke
ModMetaData.description:
Expands RimWorld's Odyssey transport-shuttle system with a family of buildable, role-distinct craft and a typed-capacity system that tracks colonists, mechs and cargo as independent pools instead of one shared mass limit. Multiplayer-compatible.
THE CRAFT - Passenger Shuttle (vanilla, folded into the system) - the balanced all-rounder: a handful of seats and modest cargo. - Troop Shuttle - fast squad insertion and extraction: many seats, light cargo, long range. - Cargo Shuttle - dedicated hauler: a large hold with just enough crew to fly it. - Heavy Cargo Ship - the flagship hauler: the biggest hold in the fleet, but slow, fuel-hungry and short-ranged. - Mechanitor Shuttle (Biotech) - a mech strike carrier flown by a mechanitor; it will not launch without one aboard. It ferries a mech warband against a bandwidth budget rather than a seat count. When landed it also doubles as a chemfuel-powered field charger: nearby colony mechs walk up to the hull and recharge from the shuttle's own fuel, no power grid required (an opt-in toggle, off by default so it never strands itself). - Transport Drone (Biotech) - a fully autonomous courier with no crew. Send it anywhere, land and hold its cargo in the field, then recall it, send it onward, form a camp, or gift its cargo to a friendly settlement for goodwill.
FEATURES - Typed capacity: colonists (seats), mechs (bandwidth budget) and cargo (mass, excluding crew and mech weight) are capped independently, with clear load-dialog readouts and over-cap warnings. - Autonomous drone: hands-free supply runs and automated diplomacy gifts; it survives the origin map being abandoned. - Mech field charging at a landed Mechanitor Shuttle, run off its own chemfuel. - Mech-bay expansion research: two tiers that raise the Mechanitor Shuttle's carried-mech bandwidth (6 to 12 to 18) and widen its field-charging line (2 to 3 to 4 mechs at once). Already-built ships benefit the moment the research completes. - Every craft is research-gated off the vanilla Shuttles project, built in the Odyssey architect category, and costs a rare shuttle engine (trader/reward only; larger craft need more).
MULTIPLAYER Built with the Multiplayer mod and tested in multiplayer sessions with no issues found. It also runs fine without Multiplayer installed. https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2606448745
Requires Odyssey. The Mechanitor Shuttle and Transport Drone additionally require Biotech.
Portions of the materials used to create this content/mod are trademarks and/or copyrighted works of Ludeon Studios Inc. All rights reserved by Ludeon. This content/mod is not official and is not endorsed by Ludeon.
